summary: US-843 release gate passed. Spexus current_context was read before task and epic hierarchy. Exact dependency reports PERSONAL-TASK-1147 through PERSONAL-TASK-1151 were present, valid JSON, succeeded, and reported no risks. Source and test inspection confirmed chooseAiAction derives decisions from getLegalActions, reports contextual no-legal-action diagnostics, and uses phase/context heuristics for bidding, contract ordering, discard, whist/check/pass, all-pass, misere, contract play, settlement, and next-deal transitions. US-scoped AI unit/integration/regression tests cover AC-2424 and AC-2425 with deterministic scenarios and auto-turn diagnostics. Fresh targeted AI release-gate tests and broad npm run verify both passed. No blocking NFR or release-readiness gap remains for this static local Vite app; backend, live API, auth, scope headers, server persistence, security, and migration gates are not applicable.

tests_run.evidence: No project virtualenv activation file exists in the requested worktree; verification continued with package.json Node scripts.

tests_run.command: checked exact dependency report paths for PERSONAL-TASK-1147 through PERSONAL-TASK-1151
tests_run.evidence: All five exact dependency report paths were found.

tests_run.command: jq review of dependency reports PERSONAL-TASK-1147 through PERSONAL-TASK-1151
tests_run.evidence: Every dependency report was valid JSON with status=succeeded, failure_type=not_applicable, and empty risks.

tests_run.command: rg inspection of src/ai/heuristicAi.ts for chooseAiAction, getLegalActions, phase helpers, diagnostics
tests_run.evidence: Confirmed AI implementation surfaces include getLegalActions, chooseAiAction, phase-specific helper functions, and no-legal-action diagnostics.

tests_run.command: rg inspection of AI unit/integration tests and integration harness
tests_run.evidence: Confirmed targeted AI tests and deterministic harness cover legality, phase-aware non-first behavior, diagnostics, and chooseAiAction plus applyAction integration.

tests_run.command: rg inspection of src/package config for browser interception, network, auth, server, migration, and localStorage terms
tests_run.evidence: Only browser localStorage persistence references were found; no fetch, XMLHttpRequest, page.route, route.fulfill, MSW, auth, server, or migration source path was found.

tests_run.command: npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: Vitest reported 3 files passed and 13 tests passed: heuristicAi.test.ts (9), aiDecision.integration.test.ts (2), integrationHarness.test.ts (2).
Vitest reported 12 files passed and 111 tests passed; tsc and vite production build completed successfully.

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

verification_environment.project_scope_note: Static local Vite browser app. Browser persistence uses localStorage only. No backend, live API, auth/scope headers, server persistence, security-sensitive server path, or database migration path applies to US-843.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Execution order is recorded in this verifier run and report; no external immutable transcript is attached.
Dependency reports are accepted only after fresh source inspection and fresh verification commands in this task.

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI chooses exactly one action from the legal action set returned by the rules engine while an AI player is active.

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI uses hand-strength, contract, trump, trick, whist, all-pass, and misere context for bids, contract orders, discards, whist decisions, and card plays.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Given an AI player is active and legal actions exist, AI selects a legal action without throwing.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Bidding, whist, contract play, all-pass, and misere decisions account for current phase/context and do not use a phase-blind first-action fallback.
